title: Peppercorn Sauce
description: My Thermomix take on Gordon Ramsay's peppercorn sauce — glossy, peppery and perfect over steak.
intro: This is my independent Thermomix homage to Gordon Ramsay and the comforting appeal of pepper steak sauce. It keeps the spirit of the original inspiration, but the method is written fresh for TM6 and TM7 cooks who want clear settings and a warm, achievable result.
steps: Chop the shallot 3 sec / speed 6. Add butter and peppercorns, sauté 3 min / 120°C / speed 1.
Add the brandy and stock, reduce 5 min / Varoma / speed 1, MC off.
Add cream and mustard, cook 3 min / 90°C / speed 2 until glossy. Season.
tips: Crush the peppercorns coarsely for bite.
Spoon over steak, chicken or roast potatoes.

faq.a: Swap the brandy for extra stock and a splash of vinegar.

faq.q: Is this the original Gordon Ramsay recipe?
faq.a: No. This is Chef Aly’s independent Thermomix reinterpretation inspired by Gordon Ramsay and pepper steak sauce; it is not endorsed by or affiliated with the chef.
